scripts.dev: npm run dev -w apps/api & npm run dev -w apps/web
scripts.start:backend: npm run start:api-gateway & npm run start:auth-service & npm run start:account-aggregation-service & npm run start:financial-core-service & npm run start:api
scripts.build:backend: npm run build:auth-service && npm run build:api-gateway && npm run build:account-aggregation-service && npm run build:financial-core-service && npm run build -w apps/api
